verdict: A well-rhythmed and energetic chart with great syncopated steps, let down by a rogue 3-panel hold and a minor late-game flow issue.

issues.problem: R, U, and D are held simultaneously (R from 76.198 to 77.674, U from 76.444 to 77.428, and D from 77.182 to 77.674). This creates a 3-panel hold ('hand' or bracket) which is overly complex and out of place for this difficulty level.
The rapid 16th-note sequence U -> R -> L forces an uncomfortable double-step on the left foot or an awkward spin right at the transition to the final D tap.
